name: Roasted Red Pepper Pizza
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can PB Pizza Crust (or Homemade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or a 13x9-inch pan.
3. Sprinkle cornmeal evenly over the bottom of the pan.
4. Place the dough in the center of the pan and press it out with your hands.
5. Spread pizza sauce evenly over the crust.
6. Top with green peppers, onions, prosciutto, and roasted red peppers.
7. Arrange cheese slices over the top.
8. Sprinkle with black olives, chives, and basil.
9. Bake at 425°F for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is deep golden brown.
10. Let stand for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
